lsp.justification: Fully matches the corrected GT: 49 whole functions (35 in src/common/sae.c via Makefile gate plus 14 in src/ap/ieee802_11.c) and the exact 9 partial functions, while excluding out-of-scope wpa_supplicant/sme.c. Minor extra mention of the inverse inline stub and a small file-count typo do not affect the requested function set or classification.
